summary: Issue #427 Ads copy templates (P2-B2 ext): intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Documented no-op — existing rules copy already satisfies Ads KPI advisory via linked one_line + static workflow next_steps; no template branches added. 13/13 contract tests pass (6 new parametrized Ads KPI cases). No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps in deterministic scoring copy paths. Non-blocking intent-review smells (duplicated test fixture, dual doc surfaces) acknowledged ship-as-is.

criticalFindings.suggestion: Extract shared computed-KPI snapshot fixture to conftest on next scoring test touch.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Local helper keeps #427 contract tests self-contained; duplication is test-only and does not affect production copy_layer behavior.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): Divergent Change — #427 no-op rationale documented in both copy_layer module docstring and MODULE.md.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Prefer MODULE.md as authority; keep module docstring to a one-line pointer if doc drift becomes noisy.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Both surfaces currently aligned on the same no-op decision; MODULE.md is the module authority per convention note; acceptable for a documentation-only slice.

criticalFindings.suggestion: Re-run contract tests against production spend ETL fixtures when promotion spend persistence lands.

interfaceChanges.description: Documentation-only #427 no-op rationale; copy generation logic unchanged; copy_source remains rules.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; all 4 ACs mapped; 13/13 contract tests pass. Accepted ship-as-is for duplicated test fixture and dual doc surfaces (documentation-only slice).
